result.name: Cat sidhe medallion
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 2 Form: Medallion in the shape of the white symbol on a cat sidhe’s chest Effect: When activated, the medallion protects the wearer from the next curse (of the cypher level or lower) that is cast upon them. The curse goes into the medallion, which shatters into thousands of tiny pieces.

sections.name: Cat sidhe medallion
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6 + 2

Form: Medallion in the shape of the white symbol on a cat sidhe’s chest

Effect: When activated, the medallion protects the wearer from the next curse (of the cypher level or lower) that is cast upon them. The curse goes into the medallion, which shatters into thousands of tiny pieces.
